scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others -n "shared,gateway,auth,menu,order,inventory,loyalty,notification,frontend" -c "gray,cyan,blue,green,magenta,yellow,red,bgBlue,bgGreen" "npm run dev -w shared" "npm run dev -w services/gateway" "npm run dev -w services/auth-service" "npm run dev -w services/menu-service" "npm run dev -w services/order-service" "npm run dev -w services/inventory-service" "npm run dev -w services/loyalty-service" "npm run dev -w services/notification-service" "npm run dev -w frontend"
